cna.title: Windows Kernel Local Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

affected.product: Windows Server 2008 Service Pack 2 (Server Core installation)
Windows Server 2008 R2 Service Pack 1 (Server Core installation)

descriptions.value: Windows Kernel Local Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability

descriptions.description: CWE-131 Incorrect Calculation of Buffer Size

descriptions.value: An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists when the Windows kernel fails to properly handle objects in memory, aka 'Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability'. This CVE ID is unique from CVE-2020-1237, CVE-2020-1246, CVE-2020-1262, CVE-2020-1264, CVE-2020-1266, CVE-2020-1269, CVE-2020-1273, CVE-2020-1274, CVE-2020-1275, CVE-2020-1276, CVE-2020-1307, CVE-2020-1316.

description_data.value: An elevation of privilege vulnerability exists when the Windows kernel fails to properly handle objects in memory, aka 'Windows Kernel Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability'.
